abilities.name: Rampage
abilities.description: At start of turn, if 0 or fewer Wounds, must declare Charge vs closest legal target not engaged. If engaged, still declare Charge but only single Attack. Gains + to attack and damage.

abilities.name: Roostercharge
abilities.description: May perform (2) Charge Action as (1) Action.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Beak (Pugilism) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Must declare Trigger. Ram BU-GAWK: After damaging, must declare Charge vs closest target. If engaged, suffers 1 damage. Crow Foot Spurs: If male, target Dazed until end of next turn. Already Dazed gets +1 damage.
(0) Delicious Egg | If female, discard card to lay egg adjacent. Within a5 of egg, Chickens gain + to Defense. Egg fresh 2 weeks.
system.notes: Six-foot-tall birds brought 100 years ago. Malifaux magic seeped into generations. Prolific spread until Gremlins noticed delicious eggs. High-strung and paranoid from constant nest raids.
